message:
feat: inline noise texture, restore decoding animation, and retheme error boundary

bead-hud.tsx:
- Replace external grainy-gradients.vercel.app noise texture URL with
  inline SVG data URI using feTurbulence fractal noise, eliminating the
  network dependency
- Bump opacity from 0.02 to 0.03 and add pointer-events-none

decoding-text.tsx:
- Rewrite from static no-op back to animated decoding effect using
  requestAnimationFrame to progressively reveal characters from random
  hex/symbol glyphs to final text
- Respect useReducedMotion from framer-motion (falls back to static)
- Support delay and duration props
- Render in-progress text in text-green-400/80 with monospace font

error-boundary.tsx:
- Replace minimal amber error card with full Frankenstein-themed error
  screen using FrankenContainer, FrankenBolt, and FrankenGlitch
- Red color scheme, pulsing alert icon, glitched "Synaptic_Failure"
  heading, styled error message, pill-style action buttons, random hex
  dump footer ID

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
